appSlogan: The Ultimate Proving Ground for the 'Chosen One'
metaDescription: Step into the most prestigious warzone in basketball history to calibrate the credibility of the 'Chosen One'.
loginToVoteHint: Sign in to vote and get your battle card
completeProfileFirst: Complete your profile to join the vote.
claimYourWarzoneDesc: Choose your warzone to cast your vote and join the battle report.
error_warzoneRequired: Warzone (team) is required. Complete profile setup first.
thanksVoted: Thanks for your stance. Data will be included in global stats.
security_verified_hint: 🛡️ Secured via Device ID & App Integrity Check
security_verified_hint_audit: 🛡️ Running secure audit & logging. Please do not close this page.
submitErrorPermissionDenied: Permission denied. Try signing out and back in, or ask the admin to deploy Firestore rules.
voteError_authRequired: Please sign in first so your vote carries full credibility.
voteError_lowScoreRobot: To prevent bot voting, this security check was stricter and your vote was not accepted. If you are human, stay on this page for a few seconds, scroll a bit, then tap the Cast your vote button again.
voteError_deviceAlreadyVoted: Device locked. One device, one ultimate verdict.
voteError_adNotWatched: Resetting stance requires a rewarded ad. Please watch the ad to completion.
voteError_resetInternal: System busy. Please try again later.
voteError_voteInternal: Vote service busy. Please try again later.
revoteError: Reset failed. Please reload the page.
revoteSignatureError: Security check failed. Set VITE_GOAT_GOLDEN_KEY_SECRET to match the backend and rebuild.
exitModalMessage: Press back again or click below to exit The GOAT Meter.
exitBattlefieldWarning: Press back again to leave the battlefield
privacyPageSubtitle: How we protect your intel. No login required to read.
privacySectionInfoContent: We collect your Google display name, email, and system-generated UID for authentication only.
privacySectionDataContent: Data is used for global stance statistics and to generate your personalized battle report card.
privacySectionStorage: Your data is stored securely on Google Firebase servers.
privacySectionAds: This app may contain rewarded ads (simulated or real) provided by Google.
privacySectionSecurityContent: We use a device identifier (deviceId) only to prevent duplicate votes and ensure the integrity of the poll. It is not used for cross-app tracking or advertising. App Check (e.g. reCAPTCHA) is used to block automated abuse and keep the system fair for all users.
privacySectionRightsContent: You may delete your account and all vote data at any time via the Danger Zone in Settings. For other data requests, use the in-app "Delete Account" option or contact our team.
dangerZoneDesc: Once deleted, your profile and vote history cannot be recovered.
deleteConfirmDesc: This cannot be undone. All profile and vote data will be removed.
saveReportToGalleryPrompt: Recon complete. Save battle report to terminal storage (gallery)?
resetStanceConfirmDesc: You can choose a new stance and reasons. Your previous vote will be removed.
resetProfileOption: Also reset profile (age, gender, team, etc.)
breakingVoteSignatureError: Security check failed. Refresh the page and try again.
breakingAlreadyVoted: You have already voted on this topic
breakingTeaser: {{count}} have participated — cast your stance to see live results
arenaDeclaration: The King's Verdict: Define the legacy. Your stance is the final record of history.
breakingCommitmentMessage: Your stance will be recorded in the archive. Once saved, it cannot be changed. Confirm this vote?
loadErrorTryAgain: Failed to load data. Please try again.
mapLegend: Gold = support · Purple = oppose · Click country to filter
loginPromptDesc: Sign in to vote and get your battle card.
completeWarzonePromptDesc: Fill in your display name, country, and stance to join the vote.
disclaimerCommunity: This app is a community-driven project and is not affiliated with the NBA or any professional athletes.
deleteAccountHintSetup: To delete your account and vote data, go to the Vote page and open Settings → Danger Zone.
unlockAnalystDesc: Get analyst access for breakdowns by country, team, and age.
intelGateDesc: Advanced data requires intel energy. Watch a video to get scan access for this session.
energyExhausted: Your intel energy is depleted. Watch another rewarded video to recharge and keep exploring.
analystGateExpiryDisclaimer: Tactical intel remains valid for 10 minutes of inactivity.
analystGateAdDisclaimer: Rewarded ads only unlock charts and advanced intel. Your existing GOAT votes are not affected.
noUserForDelete: No current user. Please sign in first.
authError_firebaseNotReady: Firebase is not configured or failed to initialize. Check .env settings.
authError_configNotFound: Firebase Auth is not set up. Enable Authentication (Google sign-in) in Firebase Console and confirm .env matches the project.
authError_unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized. Add it in Firebase Console > Authentication > Settings > Authorized domains (e.g. localhost).
authError_popupClosed: Sign-in window was closed. Please try again or use redirect sign-in if popups are blocked.
authError_popupBlocked: Sign-in popup was blocked. Allow popups or use redirect sign-in.
authError_requiresRecentLogin: This action requires recent sign-in. Please sign in again in the popup and retry.
authError_refererBlocked: Sign-in blocked (referer localhost). In Google Cloud Console, add https://localhost and https://localhost/* to the API key's allowed HTTP referrers. See docs/APK_GOOGLE_LOGIN_FIX.md.
error_profileNotFoundRevote: Profile not found. Cannot reset vote.

battleCard.disclaimer: This is a fan-made analytics project. Not affiliated with the NBA or its teams.

recaptchaDisclosure: This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <terms>Terms of Service</terms> apply.
recaptchaDisclosureAria: reCAPTCHA disclosure and links to Google Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
adminImageDrop: Drop image here or click to upload
adminSavedNoImage: Saved. Image upload failed (check Storage CORS for localhost).
breakingAdNotice: This scan requires intel energy. Watch a short clip for voting authorization.
breakingFirstVoteFreeHint: 🛡️ First Strike: Warzone authorization granted for free.
